audit_scope: All 5 TSL market codes: MNL/HDC/OU/OE/TTO — outcome name mapping, side alignment, line-shift detection

MNL.actual_outcome_variety: 165 unique outcome name patterns (team names vary per game)

mixed_market_type.note: 21 pairs have 2-outcome MNL (likely NPB/MLB without draw). CLV formula uses index 0,1 — for 3-way MNL, index 1 = draw. For 2-way MNL, index 1 = away. These are measuring DIFFERENT sides.

risk_flags: NAME_MISMATCH:3 — pregame/closing outcome name differs for 3 pairs
MIXED_MNL_MARKETS — index-1 maps to different side depending on market type
MNL.side_mapping_assessment: PARTIAL_RISK — draw is excluded in 3-way (acceptable if measuring home/away only), but 2-way vs 3-way mixing means index-1 inconsistency

HDC.note: Outcome names include the handicap spread (e.g., '底特律老虎 -2.5', '密爾瓦基釀酒人 +2.5'). A name mismatch between pregame and closing = the spread line CHANGED between snapshots. CLV formula compares by index position regardless — this computes CLV ACROSS DIFFERENT HANDICAP LINES. This is the PRIMARY outlier driver.
line_shift_examples: pregame: '底特律老虎 -2.5' / closing: '底特律老虎 -1.5' → CLV formula: odds_on_-2.5_pre vs odds_on_-1.5_close = meaningless comparison
pregame: '樂天金鷲 -1.5' / closing: '樂天金鷲 -2.5' → same issue
risk_flags: NAME_MISMATCH:28 — CRITICAL: 12.2% of HDC pairs have different outcome names = line shifts
EXTREME_CLV_CASES:17 — 17 observations with |CLV|>50%, almost all from HDC line shifts
HIGH_OUTCOME_VARIETY:175 — valid (team names + spreads), not inherently a bug
HDC.fix_required: Match outcomes by name, not by index, before computing CLV. Discard any pair where pre_name != clo_name.

OU.actual_outcome_variety: 8 unique patterns (大/小 with different totals: 7.5/8.5/9.5/10.5/11.5/12.5/13.5/others)
OU.note: OU outcome names include the total line (e.g., '大 7.5', '小 7.5'). A name mismatch = the total line shifted. Same cross-line CLV comparison risk as HDC. Less extreme (max |CLV|=22.34%) because total line shifts are smaller than handicap line shifts.
risk_flags: NAME_MISMATCH:21 — 9.1% of OU pairs have total line shifts
HIGH_OUTCOME_VARIETY:8 — different total values across games
OU.fix_required: Match outcomes by name (total line) before computing CLV. Discard any pair where pre_name != clo_name.

OE.note: Outcome names never change (single/double is absolute). No construction risk. However: OE odds rarely move — std=0.84%, 68.7% of observations have near-zero CLV. Market is structurally non-informative for CLV analysis. Should be excluded from aggregate CLV statistics as it dilutes mean toward zero artificially.

TTO.expected_outcomes: 2-way: Over X.X / Under X.X (for home or away team)
TTO.note: TTO outcome names include team total line (e.g., '大 4.5'). 32/217 pairs have line shifts (14.7% — highest rate of all markets). Same construction risk as HDC/OU. Max |CLV|=40.41%.
risk_flags: NAME_MISMATCH:32 — HIGHEST rate: 14.7% of TTO pairs have line shifts
TTO.fix_required: Match outcomes by name before computing CLV. Discard any pair where pre_name != clo_name.

aggregate_impact.note: 84 mismatch pairs across HDC/OU/TTO account for the majority of extreme CLV outliers. Top-1% outliers (n=22) are dominated by HDC line-shift artifacts.

recommended_fix.immediate: Recompute CLV using outcome NAME matching (not index matching) for HDC/OU/TTO
recommended_fix.filter_rule: If any pre_outcome_name[i] != clo_outcome_name[i] for the chosen side, discard that pair for that market
recommended_fix.expected_impact: Elimination of top-1% outlier artifact; CLV mean likely to drop closer to 0 (neutral), confirming no market efficiency advantage
